violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy 3 door reach-in #1 have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The ceiling in the retail area is in poor repair. The plastic covering of ceiling was observed ripped. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the several refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
Debris was observed at the bottom interior of the dairy refrigerators. Equipment shall be maintained clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024

The refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, ad debris. Refuse areas shall be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024

The ceiling in the salesfloor area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Inspector observed a tear in the plastic covering of the ceiling. PIC stated it was from a previous leak. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024
